table.caption: Model Versions
table.emptyBody: Create a version from a training run or a manual managed upload.

detail.title: Model Detail
detail.panelDescription: Supports version registration, alias publishing and rollback; all operations are written to the audit log.
detail.runIdPlaceholder: Fill in directly if you already have a training run
detail.versionHint: Manual versions must be created by uploading a managed file; if you already have a training run, fill in the run_id directly.
detail.conflictError: run_id and manual artifact upload cannot be used at the same time
detail.missingInputError: Please fill in run_id or select a managed artifact file
detail.aliasDescription: Publishing and rollback share the same version selector, explicitly controlling prod / staging / dev pointers.
